evidence.snippet: Founded in 2014, we have been pioneers in design and development GNSS RTK products to better cater to the industry's needs. Our portfolios cover GNSS RTK, PPK OEM boards & receivers, David GNSS Survey Receivers, NeoRTK \[GNSS survey systems\], MatrixRTK \[GNSS CORS systems\], AG autosteer systems and inertial navigation systems.

Designed for ease of use, our solutions support multi-GNSS and provide flexible interfaces for a variety of applications, such as UAVs, surveying, mapping, precision agriculture, lane-level navigation, construction engineering, and deformation monitoring.

BX50L-TAP
Multi-frequency GNSS OEM board delivers robust centimeter-level positioning with Tersus satellite-based PPP (TAP) service.

INS200
High-precision Inertial Navigation System

items.notes: Core business: GNSS OEM boards (BX-series), RTK/PPK receivers, inertial navigation systems (INS200), GNSS smart antennas explicitly designed for UAVs and autonomous systems

evidence.snippet:
TheDuck™
An efficient and productive unmanned surface vessel equipped with a single-beam echo sounder.

items.notes: TheDuck™ is a complete unmanned surface vessel (USV) for bathymetric survey

Our portfolios cover GNSS RTK, PPK OEM boards & receivers, David GNSS Survey Receivers, NeoRTK \[GNSS survey systems\], MatrixRTK \[GNSS CORS systems\], AG autosteer systems and inertial navigation systems.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures GNSS RTK OEM boards, RTK/INS modules and receivers that are embedded into UAVs and autonomous systems by third-party OEMs. Also makes TheDuck™ USV (complete platform) as secondary offering.

tagline: China-based GNSS receiver and OEM board manufacturer supplying multi-constellation positioning sensors, antennas, and software for surveying, UAV, and autonomous systems. Produces TS21, Oscar, and LUKA receiver lines plus TheDuck unmanned surface vessel. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of US defense-sector adoption or integration remains limited.
